_note: THIS FILE IS INTENTIONALLY EMPTY. The real PWA manifest lives at public/manifest.json and is also generated by vite-plugin-pwa from vite.config.js. The original root manifest.json was using NOODLES_images.jpg as icon src, which is (a) a JPEG — not a valid PWA icon format — and (b) not sized correctly. Delete this file; it is kept only as a placeholder to remind you the old file existed here.
